data.title: ONEOK (OKE) to report Q2 earnings on 2025-08-04, analysts estimate EPS at $1.36. Stock prices can heavily reflect future projections. Market performance: trading at $81.08, up 0.13% in last 52 weeks. Understanding analysts' ratings is crucial for investors.
data.description: ONEOK (OKE) is set to release its quarterly earnings on Monday, with analysts predicting an EPS of $1.36. Share prices can be impacted by future forecasts more than past performance. In the last quarter, the company missed earnings by $0.20, causing a 6.49% drop in share price. Past performance: Q1 2025 - EPS Est: $1.24, Actual: $1.04, Price Change: -6.0%. Market performance as of July 31: Stock trading at $81.08, 52-week return up 0.13%. Analysts have given ONEOK 7 ratings, leading to a positive market sentiment. Investors are hopeful for surpassing estimates and guidance for the next quarter. Full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Palantir (PLTR) to report $0.12 EPS on 2025-08-04. Past quarter miss saw 12.05% share drop. Stock is up 529.54% in 52 weeks. Analysts optimistic.
data.description: Palantir Technologies is set to release its quarterly earnings on August 4, 2025, with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.12. Previous quarters have seen mixed results, with a miss in the last quarter resulting in a 12.05% drop in share price. The stock has shown strong growth, with a 529.54% increase over the past 52 weeks, trading at $158.35 as of July 31. Investors will be looking for positive guidance for future growth from the company. Analysts' views on Palantir are crucial, and market sentiments will heavily influence how the stock reacts to the earnings report. It's important to note that stock price movements may be more influenced by guidance than earnings beats or misses.

data.title: Axon Enterprise's earnings report to be released on 2025-08-04, analysts predict EPS of $0.91. Past EPS beats led to 14.13% share price increase. Shares up 157.3% in 52-week period, analysts give consensus rating of Buy.
data.description: Axon Enterprise (NASDAQ: AXON) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on August 4, 2025, with analysts expecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.91. The anticipation is high as investors hope for surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter, as market reactions are often driven by guidance rather than just earnings performance. In the last quarter, the company beat EPS estimates by $0.17, resulting in a 14.13% increase in share price the following day. Over the past quarters, Axon Enterprise has shown strong performance, with significant price changes like a 14% increase in Q1 2025 and a 29% rise in Q3 2024. As of July 31, shares were trading at $755.49, marking a 157.3% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analysts have given Axon Enterprise a consensus rating of Buy, highlighting positive market sentiments and expectations in the industry. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: VRTX) to reveal earnings of $4.04 EPS on Monday 2025-08-04. Shares at $456.87, down 3.27% in 52 weeks. Analysts recommend Neutral with a $482.9 target.
data.description: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: VRTX) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on August 4, 2025. Analysts predict earnings per share (EPS) of $4.04. Investors are eagerly awaiting the release, hoping for results that exceed estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. The company missed EPS last quarter by $0.23, leading to a 10.03% drop in share price the next day. The stock was trading at $456.87 as of July 31, down 3.27% over the last 52 weeks. With 10 analyst ratings, Vertex has a consensus Neutral rating and an average one-year price target of $482.9, suggesting a potential 5.7% upside.

data.title: Skyflow introduces MCP Data Security for Enterprises/SaaS, using AI agents, ensuring secure data access.
data.description: Skyflow, based in Palo Alto, California, has introduced MCP Data Protection for Enterprises. This innovative solution allows companies utilizing AI agents to securely access sensitive data while maintaining functionality. The launch aims to address the growing need for data security in business environments, particularly those leveraging artificial intelligence. This development signifies Skyflow's commitment to advancing data protection measures, catering to enterprises seeking robust safeguards for critical information.

data.title: Belden's PPC Hybrid Fiber/Power OVP Terminal wins Silver at 2025 ISE Network Innovators' Awards.
data.description: St. Louis-based Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC), a prominent worldwide supplier of comprehensive connection solutions, revealed that their cutting-edge PPC Hybrid Fiber/Power OVP Terminal has been acknowledged as a top industry product by the ISE Network Innovators’ Awards. Judges, drawn from the telecom sector, granted the product Silver honoree recognition. This was based on factors such as originality, innovation, cost-effectiveness, and its beneficial impact on customers.

data.title: DevvStream buys Bitcoin and Solana using initial $10M; plans to expand credit facility to $300M.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, DevvStream Corp. (Nasdaq: DEVS) revealed its launch of a crypto treasury strategy, using a portion of its initial $10 million from a $300 million senior secured convertible notes facility with Helena Global Investment Opportuniti. The strategy involves investing in Bitcoin ($BTC) and Solana ($SOL) as part of the company's focus on carbon management and environmental asset development. DevvStream is recognized as a key player in this field, engaging in the investment and sale of such assets.

data.title: LP Building Solutions declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share to common stockholders.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, LP Building Solutions has revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share for common stockholders.

data.title: TelevisaUnivision names John Farrell as Head of Partnerships, overseeing global content distribution. Repots to CEO Daniel Alegre.
data.description: In Miami, a prominent Spanish-language media company, TelevisaUnivision, revealed the naming of John Farrell as Head of Partnerships. This newly established position aims to consolidate the company's worldwide content distribution, platform partnerships, corporate development, and global expansion endeavors. Tasked with overseeing distribution strategies for linear, digital, streaming, and emerging platforms, Farrell will directly report to TelevisaUnivision CEO Daniel Alegre. This move signals the company's strategic focus on enhancing its outreach and growth in the industry.

data.title: SEGG Media relaunching Aganar operations in Mexico, aiming for $5.2M revenue, part of LATAM expansion.
data.description: SEGG Media Corporation (NASDAQ: SEGG, LTRYW) based in Fort Worth, Texas, disclosed on August 1, 2025, its plans to revive Aganar operations in Mexico. This move is part of the company's strategy for expanding in Latin America (LATAM) and leverages its existing license to sell lottery draw games through Lotería National (the Mexican National Lottery). Aganar will be managed by Medios Electrónicos Y De Comunicación, S.A.P.I. de CV, a subsidiary of Global Gaming Enterprises Inc., which is fully owned by SEGG Media. This significant development marks a pivotal moment in SEGG Media's portfolio, as the company owns Sports.com, Concerts.com, and Lottery.com.

data.title: Global suppositories market to reach $2.05 billion by 2030, growing at 4.7% CAGR from 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of August 1, 2025, the worldwide Suppositories Market saw a rise from US$1.56 billion in 2024 to US$1.63 billion in 2025. Projections indicate a steady growth with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.7% expected from 2025 to 2030. This upward trend suggests the market may reach a predicted worth of US$2.05 billion by the end of the forecasting period.

data.title: Global 3D Avatar Solution Market to reach US$1,234.37 million by 2031; growth driven by e-commerce, AI, ML, real-time rendering innovations.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, a recent report from The Insight Partners revealed a notable increase in the global 3D avatar solution market. The surge is attributed to advancements in e-commerce, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and real-time rendering technologies. Key factors driving this growth include the adoption of 3D avatars in various industries for enhanced user experience and engagement. The market size for 3D avatar solutions has reached a substantial figure, demonstrating a promising outlook for the industry in the foreseeable future.

data.title: Aerospace composites market to reach $70.7B by 2031 at 10.80% CAGR, driven by demand for fuel-efficient aircraft and material innovation.
data.description: The aerospace composites market is expected to experience significant growth due to the increasing need for lightweight and fuel-efficient aircraft, as well as continued investments in material research and development. Despite these promising prospects, the industry faces challenges related to high production expenses and difficulties in recyclability. This underscores the importance of effective cost control strategies and advancements in technology to address these issues. data.title: Manufacturing PMI at 48%; New orders and backlogs contract, production grows, employment contracts. Raw materials inventories and customer inventories too low, prices increasing. Exports and imports contract.
data.description: In TEMPE, Arizona, on August 1, 2025, there were notable shifts in various aspects of the economy. While new orders and backlogs experienced a decline, production saw growth. However, employment rates decreased during this period. Supplier deliveries were quicker, but raw materials inventories dwindled. Customers were noted to have very low inventories. Prices were on the rise. Both exports and imports saw a contraction in activity.
